name: didiff
title: didiff
description: Quickly open didiff — local paste-to-paste character-level diff checker
author: didiff

commands.name: open-didiff
commands.title: Open didiff
commands.description: Open the local didiff PWA in your browser

commands.name: diff-texts
commands.title: Diff Texts
commands.description: Paste two texts and open them in didiff

commands.name: diff-clipboard
commands.title: Diff Clipboard into didiff
commands.description: Put the current clipboard into the original pane and open didiff

preferences.name: appUrl
preferences.title: didiff URL
preferences.description: URL where didiff is running (e.g. http://localhost:4173 after npm run preview)
